/home/kacent/cppWorkSpace/GSDK/Tool/bin/aarch64-buildroot-linux-gnu-g++ --sysroot=/home/kacent/cppWorkSpace/GSDK/Tool/aarch64-buildroot-linux-gnu/sysroot -march=armv8-a -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/gsdk_basic_example.dir/examples/sdk_basic_example.cpp.o -o bin/gsdk_basic_example   -L/home/kacent/cppWorkSpace/GSDK/lib/aarch64  -Wl,-rpath,/home/kacent/cppWorkSpace/GSDK/lib/aarch64:/home/kacent/cppWorkSpace/GSDK/lib/aarch64/3rd:/home/kacent/cppWorkSpace/GSDK/lib/aarch64/boost:/home/kacent/cppWorkSpace/GSDK/lib/aarch64/ctb:/home/kacent/cppWorkSpace/GSDK/lib/aarch64/event:/home/kacent/cppWorkSpace/GSDK/lib/aarch64/pcre2:/home/kacent/cppWorkSpace/GSDK/lib/aarch64/quic:/home/kacent/cppWorkSpace/GSDK/lib/aarch64/ffmpeg:/home/kacent/cppWorkSpace/GSDK/lib/aarch64/OSG365 ../lib/aarch64/libZiyan.so -lssl -lcrypto -lz -lcurl -lzip -ltinyxml2 -ljaiotcppsdk -lpcre2-8 -lsqlite3 -lavcodec -lavdevice -lswresample -lswscale -lavfilter -lavformat -lavutil -lpthread -lboost_filesystem-mt-a64 -lboost_system-mt-a64 -lboost_atomic-mt-a64
